S.FORM: cecay a tamdaw patongalen to cecay, masasiolahay to, ta mararamod to. == 1 ==
S.PHON: ʦəʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw pato~uŋaɾən to~u ʦəʦaj, masasio~uɾaħaj to~u, ta mararamo~uɬ~ɮ to~u. == * ==
S.FORM: cecay a tamdaw patongalen to cecay, masasiolahay to, ta mararamod to. == 1 ==
S.PHON: ʦəʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw pato~uŋaɾən to~u ʦəʦaj, masasio~uɾaħaj to~u, ta mararamo~uɬ~ɮ to~u. == * ==
